skills.name: moe-planning
skills.description: 8-phase plan template for moe.submit_plan (plan → explore → tests → minimum impl → verify → document → adversarial review → QA loop), with skip rules for trivial work.

skills.name: explore-before-assume
skills.description: Verify every symbol (function, model, attribute, constant) actually exists before referencing it. Eliminates hallucinated-API bugs.
triggeredBy: worker on first start_step in unfamiliar code

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.description: Vendored from superpowers. Multi-step plan structure with checkpoints; output format aligns with moe.submit_plan step lists.

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: Vendored from superpowers. Socratic questions to refine vague requirements before any plan is written.

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: Vendored from superpowers. RED-GREEN-REFACTOR with mutation-resistant assertions (assertEquals, not assert).

skills.name: verification-before-completion
skills.description: Vendored from superpowers. Forces running verification commands and confirming output before any complete claim. Evidence before assertions.

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: Vendored from superpowers. 4-phase root-cause method (root-cause-tracing, defense-in-depth, condition-based-waiting). Use on bugs and test failures, before proposing fixes.

skills.name: adversarial-self-review
skills.description: Read your own diff as an attacker, not an author. Concurrency / null / embarrassment checklist before final complete_step or complete_task.

skills.name: regression-check
skills.description: Run the broader test suite (not just new tests) before complete_task. Goal: zero regressions, evidence-based summary.

skills.name: receiving-code-review
skills.description: Vendored from superpowers. Adversarial response to QA feedback — verify, don't capitulate; don't perform agreement.

skills.name: moe-qa-loop
skills.description: Structured QA review flow: read plan + diff, verify DoD coverage, decide qa_approve vs qa_reject with actionable rejectionDetails.
triggeredBy: claim a task in REVIEW status

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
skills.description: Vendored from superpowers. Isolated workspace per feature so parallel workers don't step on each other's .moe/ state.

skills.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.description: Vendored from superpowers. Fan-out for 2+ independent tasks with no shared state or sequential dependencies.
